Name: Curse
Effects: Gives enemies a chance to spawn cursed with a purple outline. Cursed enemies have +25% Damage, +15% Speed, and +150% HP +2% per Curse Stat additional HP. They also drop 33% additional Materials. Causes items and weapons in the Shop to have a chance to spawn enhanced with a curse buff, increasing their stats significantly and decreasing their downsides.
Limit: Diminishing Returns on chance to spawn enemies and items. Can't go above 50% Chance to spawn cursed enemies, 15% to spawn cursed items. Cursed HP scaling maxes out at 300 Curse.
